data.title: Gears
data.synopsis:
Long ago, astronomy research was carried out using gears that were said to measure the heavens. During his travels, the protagonist Gear comes across a mysterious gear with a compass attached. As he follows the compass, he comes across an injured animal lying on the ground. As he tries to treat the animal and continue his journey, he is led to a tunnel. At the end of the tunnel....

(Source: Ikebukuro Mirai International Film Festival)

(Source: Netflix)

data.title: Ganglion
data.synopsis:
Early 2000s Tokyo. Isobe, a combatant for the evil corporation Ganglion, spends his days on the battlefield. Whether it's the "Tokyo Cedar Pollen Operation" or the "Mount Fuji Demolition Plan," he faces off in nothing but a bodysuit, only to be crushed by the hero Hopeman time and again. As he struggles under unreasonable bosses during the dawn of compliance, his story unfolds—a workplace drama dedicated to all who work, following the bittersweet life of a salaryman soldier.

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: Guilty Hole: Room of Guilty Pleasure

data.title: Guilty Hole
data.title_english: Guilty Hole: Room of Guilty Pleasure
data.synopsis:
"Please pick your favorite student..."

This overworked and underpaid teacher, Mr. Sasaki, has his whole life turned upside down when he stumbles upon the "Guilty Hole."
He thinks it's a dream when he sees the student's shoe lockers have been transformed into selection panels... seeing one that catches his eye, he joking picks her...

When she appears in his classroom in the middle of the night, throwing insults at him, but her eyes seem to linger on him, tinged with embarassment.

"I'll finish this quickly so... Don't hold back, ok...?"

Thus begins a forbidden relationship...
Welcome to the Guilty Hole, where anything is allowed--

(Source: Official website, translated)
data.background: The TV version broadcast started on July, 5 2025 on Tokyo MX and BS11, while the complete, uncensored version was streamed on the ComicFesta website. This entry reflects the uncut 18+ version of the anime.

data.title: Natsuzuma
data.synopsis: Sometimes, even passionate relationships eventually turn into a domestic dead end. It is important not to let this happen and find time for your other half. Yumiko's husband did not understand this simple truth, so he preferred other things to do, just not to go on vacation with his family. But don't worry. There are guys who will not allow a married woman to be bored alone. Gentlemen organize a program for her, where in the mornings Yumiko is roasted by the hot sun, and at night...

data.title: Kill Ao
data.synopsis:
Juuzou Oogami is a legendary hitman who has never failed an assignment, no matter how impossible. One day, after wiping out a powerful organization, he is stung by a mysterious wasp and collapses. When he wakes up, the fearsome 39-year-old assassin has been transformed into a 13-year-old boy!

Before he can even process what happened, his boss delivers a new order: "In that body, infiltrate a middle school." What awaits him is an unexpected school life filled with colorful classmates, youthful chaos, and looming danger. Can Juuzou ever return to his original form? Or will the assassins closing in on him end his second life before it even begins!?

(Source: Official site)
